decision: Behavioral/token/cost evidence could not be accepted because the first live F1 VANILLA run failed at Claude Code authentication before model execution.
observations: F1 VANILLA stream was captured and converted with stream-to-run.mjs.
validate-run.mjs accepted the resulting run record as schema-valid.
The run record is classified as PROCESS_FAILURE with retryClassification AUTH.
The stream reported zero input tokens, zero output tokens, and zero total cost because no model inference completed.
